text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day of my debut has arrived. With
victory, I shall rise to become the new shining star
the masses so desire.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A thunderous declaration! My followers watch in
awe as I turn my imposing back and make for the
battlefield!
